name: Nyar'zathul, the Crawling Dream
ability: This unit is also a nexus token. If it is removed using INCOMPREHENSIBLE FORM, produce 1 hit and assign it to 1 of your opponents' ships.

name: The Recurring
ability: When this unit would be destroyed, you may spend 1 influence to place it on another planet in a system that contains 1 of your nexus tokens or your flagship.

name: Liturgy I
ability: At the end of a tactical action in this unit's system, you may place or move 1 nexus token into this system.

name: Liturgy II
ability: At the end of a tactical action in this unit's system, you may place or move 1 nexus token into any system that contains your units.

name: The Fractal
ability: After this unit is destroyed, place fighters in its system up to its capacity value.

name: Refractum
ability: After another player produces 1 or more hits against you during ground combat, you may choose to assign 1 of those hits to 1 of your fighters in the active system instead.

name: The Pyre
ability: For each infantry destroyed by this unit's BOMBARDMENT ability, commit 1 infantry from your reinforcements to that planet.

name: Balefire Sentinel
ability: When this unit would be destroyed, place it on this card. At the start of your next turn place each unit on this card on planets you control in your home system.

name: Ashfall Engine I
ability: During combat, when this unit would be destroyed, you may use its BOMBARDMENT ability against a planet in its system.

name: Ashfall Engine II
ability:
This unit cannot be destroyed by "Direct Hit" action cards.

During combat, when this unit would be destroyed or uses its SUSTAIN DAMAGE ability, you may use its BOMBARDMENT ability against a planet in its system.

name: Cinderborn I
ability: When this unit would be destroyed, roll 1 die. On a 9 or higher, you may produce 1 hit. If you do, place that unit on this card. At the start of your next turn, place each unit on this card on planets you control in your home system.

name: Cinderborn II
ability: When this unit would be destroyed, roll 1 die. On a 6 or higher, you may produce 1 hit. If you do, place that unit on this card. At the start of your next turn, place each unit on this card on planets you control in your home system.

name: Iron Dominion
ability: Your mechs in the space area of this system gain Anti-Fighter Barrage 7(x2).

name: Riptide I
ability: When this unit is destroyed, place 1 infantry from your reinforcements on its planet. If it was in the space area, place 1 fighter instead.

name: Riptide II
ability: When this unit is destroyed, place 1 infantry from your reinforcements on its planet. If it was in the space area, place 1 fighter instead. This unit may move without being transported. Mechs in excess of capacity count against your fleet limit.

name: Worldshaper
ability: 1 planet in this system you control has its resource and influence values increased by 1, and 1 planet in this system controlled by another player has its resource and influence values reduced by 1.

name: Valuator
ability: DEPLOY: When you attach a design to a planet, you may spend 1 resource to place a mech on that planet.

name: E.M.P
ability: SPACE CANNON cannot be used against your units in this system. Space Docks being blockaded by this unit lose their PRODUCTION ability.

name: Legion
ability: DEPLOY: When you place a structure, you may spend 1 resource to place a mech with that structure.

name: Siphon I
ability:
This unit's PRODUCTION value is equal to 2 more than this planet's resource value. 

Up to 3 fighters in this system do not count against capacity.

name: Siphon II
ability:
This unit's PRODUCTION value is equal to 4 more than this planet's resource value. 

When using this unit's PRODUCTION ability, discount the combined cost of the units produced by 1 for every 2 other player's control tokens on your faction sheet. 

Up to 3 fighters in this system do not count against capacity.

name: The Chained
ability: Other player's units in this system lose their unit abilities while this unit is not damaged.

name: Penitent
ability: This unit gains +1 to its combat rolls for each exhausted doctrine in your play area.
